steps.name: stage1-content-seed-data
steps.last_known_state: Stage 1 ScriptableObject seed data is created. Stage1Definition references 27 rooms, 10 items, 7 puzzles, 18 events, 9 monster nodes, and 62 sound definitions.
steps.next_action: Open the next Harness unit for the first runtime system slice, recommended RoomRuntimeSystem.

decision_log.decision: User instructed Codex to continue until the final result and said approvals can always be assumed.
Approved exception to seed multiple Stage 1 data assets in one system unit because the assets are tightly coupled and generated from the same validated data model.

steps.resume_prompt: Stage1ContentSeedData is complete. Continue with RoomRuntimeSystem or the next approved Harness unit.
